description_long: This is a modern, single-story house set within a rectangular, fenced lot featuring a mix of open green spaces, paved walkways, and mature trees. The house itself is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes with flat roofs, large windows, and a minimalist aesthetic. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, a backyard with a swimming pool, and landscaped areas with shrubs and trees. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or concrete, with some sections featuring darker accents. The windows are generously sized and asymmetrically arranged, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is defined by a simple, flat-roofed overhang and a paved approach from the street.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a garage, and a backyard pool, set within a landscaped, fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, garage, and a row of trees along the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, open green space, and the rear sections of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool area, and the full extent of the fenced property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and additional landscaping along the side yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flat-roofed overhang with a paved approach, minimal decorative elements, and a modern door.
